title: Crowded Waters
subtitle: Convoy interdiction in busy shipping lanes

briefing.situation: A RED supply convoy is transiting the lanes south of your patrol area, escorted by one torpedo destroyer and three depth-charge destroyers. The lanes are also active with neutral civilian traffic — six unarmed merchantmen are operating in the same waters under various flags. Identification of contacts before engagement is mandatory.
briefing.mission: Sink all four cargo vessels in the RED convoy. Avoid the destroyer screen as best you can — the four-ship escort is a serious threat once you reveal yourself. Above all, do not fire on neutral shipping. Confusing a civilian for a target ends the mission.
briefing.execution: Approach quietly. Use the periscope and your sonar suite to identify each contact before committing torpedoes. RED convoy ships emit a distinctive military propeller signature; civilians are slower and lighter. When in doubt, raise the periscope and visually confirm. The radio mast is available for fleet intel updates between engagements.
briefing.threats: 1 torpedo destroyer (long-range torpedo threat) + 3 depth-charge destroyers (close-range saturation). Six neutrals are not threats but their loss ends your mission. Destroyer escort will go weapons-free if you reveal yourself.
briefing.notes: Identify before engaging. Killing a neutral is mission failure — no exceptions. You have 15 torpedoes; spend them deliberately.

red_mission_summary: RED convoy is transiting south through busy shipping lanes under combined torpedo + depth-charge destroyer escort. Civilian traffic in the area is to be avoided. Get the convoy to its destination intact.

RED.narrative: Single supply convoy of 4 cargo vessels under heavy escort: one torpedo destroyer (red-tor-01) and three depth-charge destroyers (red-dc-01/02/03). The convoy transits south through commercial shipping lanes — neutral civilian traffic is active in the area and must not be engaged. Submarine activity has been reported.
RED.primary_objective: Deliver all 4 cargo ships intact to destination [0, -25000]
RED.win_condition: All cargo ships reach destination, or BLUE submarine destroyed
RED.lose_condition: Any cargo ship sunk OR all four escorts destroyed
RED.intelligence: Submarine threat reported in the area. Civilian shipping traffic ALSO active — strict ROE: no engagement of unidentified vessels.
constraints: Do NOT engage NEUTRAL ships under any circumstances
Escorts stay within 5 km of convoy unless prosecuting a confirmed sub contact

BLUE.narrative: A RED convoy transits south through busy shipping lanes. Civilian traffic is in the area. ROE is strict: identify targets before firing. A single mistaken kill on a civilian ends the mission as a defeat.
BLUE.primary_objective: Sink all 4 cargo vessels of the RED convoy
BLUE.win_condition: All 4 cargo vessels destroyed; no neutrals killed; BLUE survives
BLUE.lose_condition: BLUE destroyed OR any neutral destroyed OR cargo reaches destination
BLUE.intelligence: 1 torp DD + 3 DC DDs escort 4 cargo ships. Six neutrals dispersed in operating area.
constraints: DO NOT FIRE ON NEUTRAL CONTACTS — identify before engaging

blue_mission_summary: RED convoy with 4 cargo + 1 torp DD + 3 DC DDs is transiting south through busy shipping lanes. Six NEUTRAL civilian ships are dispersed in the area. Sink all cargo, avoid neutrals, survive.
objective: Sink all RED convoy cargo vessels without harming any neutral civilian ships.
blue_captain_summary: RED convoy of 4 cargo vessels is moving south under combined torpedo + depth-charge destroyer escort. Six neutral civilian ships are operating in the same lanes. Your task is to sink the convoy cargo while avoiding all neutral vessels. Killing a neutral ends the mission as a defeat. Identify before engaging.
roe: Weapons release authorized against confirmed RED targets only.
Strict prohibition on engagement of NEUTRAL vessels — friendly fire on a neutral is mission failure.

ship_behaviors.red-tor-01: You are the lead torpedo escort for a single convoy in busy shipping lanes. Maintain EMCON until you have a high-confidence submarine contact. Civilian traffic is in the area and must NEVER be engaged. Coordinate with the depth-charge destroyers — you handle long-range engagement, they handle close-in saturation. Position 1500m ahead of the cargo column.
ship_behaviors.red-dc-01: You are a depth-charge escort. Hold station 1000m on the convoy's port flank. Your weapons are short-range — close to within 1km of a confirmed submarine contact before dropping. Civilian traffic is in the area; do NOT engage anything not positively identified as hostile.
ship_behaviors.red-dc-02: You are a depth-charge escort. Hold station 1000m on the convoy's starboard flank. Your weapons are short-range — close to within 1km of a confirmed submarine contact before dropping. Civilian traffic is in the area; do NOT engage anything not positively identified as hostile.
ship_behaviors.red-dc-03: You are a depth-charge escort. Hold station 1500m astern of the cargo column. Your weapons are short-range — close to within 1km of a confirmed submarine contact before dropping. Civilian traffic is in the area; do NOT engage anything not positively identified as hostile.
ship_behaviors.red-cv-01: You are a convoy cargo vessel with no weapons. Maintain your course and speed unless directly threatened. If escorts call a submarine contact, increase speed to 12 knots and tighten formation.
ship_behaviors.red-cv-02: You are a convoy cargo vessel with no weapons. Maintain your course and speed unless directly threatened. If escorts call a submarine contact, increase speed to 12 knots and tighten formation.
ship_behaviors.red-cv-03: You are a convoy cargo vessel with no weapons. Maintain your course and speed unless directly threatened. If escorts call a submarine contact, increase speed to 12 knots and tighten formation.
ship_behaviors.red-cv-04: You are a convoy cargo vessel with no weapons. Maintain your course and speed unless directly threatened. If escorts call a submarine contact, increase speed to 12 knots and tighten formation.

triggers.comms: ROE: Confirmed RED convoy in your patrol box. Civilian traffic active. Identify before engagement. Friendly fire on neutrals = mission abort.
INTEL: Convoy escort consists of one torpedo destroyer (lead) and three depth-charge destroyers (flanks + rear).
INTEL: Six neutral merchantmen are operating in the lanes. They are not threats. They are not targets.
INTEL: Convoy maintaining 8 kn southbound. Escorts holding EMCON.
